text:
Created attachment 252668
bootloader fails to load OS with 4k monitor video

it shows ghostbsd but the behavior is identical with freebsd. 

With 5k monitor, the computer simply restarts itself after trying to load the OS instead of proceeding with loading the OS. It will load the OS if you drop to the loader prompt and type "gop set 2"
